creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->freebsd-ports-bugs

We have no control on packages and as you have said that it doesn't only 
happen on gnome2, which xfce has problem too. I am guessing you are fetching 
from wrong mirror or maybe wrong version or something got mess up. You didn't 
give us enough detail such as what's version of FreeBSD? Did you tweak anything 
on your FreeBSD machine? and etc.
